Title: Order Management Specialist - trainee
Description: As an integral part of the supply chain and logistics team, I specialize in ensuring smooth order processing and inventory management for FMCG operations.  My key responsibilities include: Order Adjustments: Managing and readjusting orders prior to dispatch to ensure accuracy and alignment with client needs. Inventory Coordination: Searching for and verifying items in the order sheet, reducing discrepancies, and optimizing stock movement between the central warehouse and FMCG outlets. Order Fulfillment: Overseeing the completion and handover of orders to FMCG outlets, ensuring timely and efficient delivery. Reporting & Analysis: Preparing logistics reports and other assigned operational analyses for the General Manager and senior management to support decision-making. With a focus on accuracy, efficiency, and collaboration, I contribute to reducing errors, streamlining processes, and enhancing overall supply chain performance.
